title: Why People Are Upset About a Singer at a Music Festival
summary: A music festival in London called Wireless Festival has booked a famous singer named Kanye West, also known as Ye, to perform in July. Many people are angry about this because Kanye has said and done things that hurt Jewish people. For example, he made a song with a bad name and sold shirts with a hateful symbol. Jewish groups and politicians want the festival to cancel his show and stop him from coming to the UK. They say his actions are wrong and make Jewish people feel unsafe. Some companies that were helping with the festival, like Pepsi and PayPal, have stopped supporting it because of this. The festival has rules against discrimination, but it still booked Kanye, which has caused a big argument. People are asking the government to step in and not let Kanye into the country.

background_read: This article is about a music festival in London that invited a singer named Kanye West to perform. Kanye has done things that hurt Jewish people, like making a song with a mean name and selling shirts with a symbol that is used to hate Jewish people. Many people, including Jewish groups and leaders, think this is wrong and want the festival to cancel his show. They also want the government to not let him come to the UK. Some big companies that were helping with the festival have stopped because they don't agree with booking Kanye. The festival has rules against being mean to people because of their religion, so people are confused why they booked him. This is causing a big debate about what is right and wrong.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jewish groups, politicians, companies like Pepsi and PayPal, and the festival organizers.
WHAT: People are upset because Kanye West, a singer who hurt Jewish people, is booked to perform at Wireless Festival.
WHERE: At the Wireless Festival in London, UK.
WHY: To stop discrimination and make sure Jewish people feel safe, and because Kanye's actions go against the festival's rules.

perspectives.description: They believe Kanye West should not perform because his antisemitic actions harm Jewish people and violate the festival's anti-discrimination rules.
They have not responded, but they booked Kanye, which some see as ignoring their own rules against discrimination.
